title: Desaturated Netherite
description: A Texture Pack That Desaturates Netherite Tools  And Armor
body:
# Desaturated Netherite
 **A Texture Pack That Desaturates All Netherite Tools And Armor**  

 ![Desaturated Netherite Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec9bf85abfabbe4bfb839a9110593b4fd8ba74e2.png)

# Features
- Desaturates All Netherite Tools
- Desaturates Every Netherite Armor Piece
- Supports All Versions Above 1.21.3+
